CustomField.description: Comma-separated Opportunity Stage values that are considered "Won" for commission purposes. Orgs may have "Closed Won", "Booked", "Contract Signed", "Funded", etc. Captured during onboarding wizard. Default: "Closed Won".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated stage names that trigger commission processing. e.g., "Closed Won,Booked,Contract Signed"
CustomField.label: Won Stages
